hooks.command: bash -c 'CHANGED=$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" diff --name-only --cached 2>/dev/null) && echo "$CHANGED" | grep -qE "^main/opengeometry(-three)?/(src|examples-vite|tests)/" || exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && echo "[hook] running cargo fmt --check" && cargo fmt --check --manifest-path main/opengeometry/Cargo.toml && echo "[hook] running cargo check" && cargo check --manifest-path main/opengeometry/Cargo.toml --quiet && echo "[hook] running npm run lint:check" && npm run --silent lint:check && echo "[hook] gates passed"'
